## #44527
- added: 2021-07-13 07:39:08
- completed: 2021-11-09 08:40:29

Correlation ID to toggle:\n\nTalk to Catalyst to reproduce issue, Clara about time line\n\n\\\n\\[13:07\\] Carlyle, Benjamin\n|    | VPCM | Target |\n|----|----|----|\n| Via TPE | Hercules 2020-PI3 **F195323**Enabled if toggle “VPC-M: Populate CorrelationId in DE127 to RSC” is enabled | Catalyst 2021-PI3 F335462 (development ongoing)Toggle TBC |\n| Via RSC API | Hercules 2020-PI3 **F195323**Enabled if toggle “VPC-M: Populate CorrelationId in DE127 to RSC” is enabled | Cynus 2020-PI2 F189773Enabled if toggle “System Toggle: Log Correlation ID for S2I” is enabled |\n\n\\\n

## #44426
- added: 2021-06-23 11:16:25
- completed: 2021-08-27 09:06:28

Mark,\n\n- [ ] Shared properties where to put? Different repo? So we will have 3 repos?\n- [ ] application, tier and node mapping. Make the map.\n- [ ] Add the map of node, tier, app to Puppet code.\n- [ ] Do you want us to collect the Prod properties in next PI? We will be in a different Squad.\n- [ ] History is called history API v2, so we missed properties. Map.\n- [ ] Why the toggle value is kept in thread context? It will not refresh if toggle changed before thread dies.\n- [ ] Can we add new OLTP service to be accessible from HotHot asset service? \n- [ ] Use business service as hub in worst case.\n\nGeorg,\n\n- [ ] Discovery not working HotHot to OLTP.\n\n\\\n

- completed: 2021-11-09 08:40:06
